item.title: Bipartisan Corruption Exposed: How Lobbying and AIPAC Influence Washington This isn’t left vs right. It’s the American people vs a system flooded with lobbying money and foreign influence. Until we break that grip, “America First” is just a slogan. Time t

item.title: You don’t remove your top commander in the middle of a war and call it victory. That’s not strategy, that’s panic. When leadership at the very top gets purged during active operations, it signals something is going seriously wrong behind the scenes. A gr
